strengths: Extensive backend engineering and distributed systems experience, including building high-throughput, low-latency microservices.
Recent hands-on experience developing AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Prior exposure to the fintech sector through software development work at an investment capital firm.
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience and has no demonstrated track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
Does not meet the hard requirement of deep production experience operating complex, multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes environments.
Missing specialized domain expertise in algorithmic working-capital management, real-time credit risk, and trade decisioning.
response.justification: While Bogdan possesses a strong technical background in distributed systems, low-latency backends, and recent exposure to AI-agent tooling, he falls significantly short of the executive leadership requirements for a CTO role. He lacks the mandated 5+ years of senior technical leadership, experience scaling engineering organizations, and deep production history with complex, high-stakes multi-agent AI systems in the fintech space.
